# Exploratory Session Charter — SBTM

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Session ID | ES-<cohort>-<nn> |
| Tester | |
| Date / start time | |
| Duration (timebox) | 90 min |
| App / build | |

## Charter (the mission — one sentence)
> Explore <area> using <resources/technique> to discover <type of information>.
>
> Example: *Explore the cart and checkout totals using boundary values and repeated add/remove cycles to discover calculation and state defects.*

## Areas / tour plan
- Primary target:
- Secondary (if time remains):
- Explicitly NOT this session:

## Session Notes (live, timestamped)
Keep raw. Note what you tried, what surprised you, questions raised.

```
hh:mm — 
hh:mm — 
```

## Bugs Raised
| BUGS-key | One-line summary | Severity |
|---|---|---|

## Issues / Questions (not bugs, but need answers)
-

## Coverage self-assessment
- % of session on charter vs off-charter (opportunity testing):
- Areas that still feel untested:
- Follow-up charter suggested:

## Debrief (with reviewer)
PROOF: Past (what happened) · Results (what was found) · Obstacles · Outlook (next) · Feelings (confidence in the area)
